name: Marinated Pasta Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all dressing ingredients in a bowl.
2. Refrigerate the dressing for at least 1 hour to allow flavors to meld.
3. Cook pasta according to package directions until al dente.
4. Rinch cooked pasta with cold water and drain well to prevent overcooking.
5. Add broccoli, red onions, and pepperoni to the cooled pasta.
6. Chill the mixture in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes to allow flavors to develop.
7. Just before serving, slice tomatoes into eighths.
8. Mix in the dressing and toss well.
9. Garnish with wedges of hard-cooked eggs.
10. Serve immediately.
